response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for both '敗北の少年' and 'Luna say maybe'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for song lyrics transcription and translation; manual transcription used for spoken interjections. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are anchored precisely to vocal cord activation. Visual title cards are subtitled during instrumental segments. Rapid-fire lyrics in 'Luna say maybe' use aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 敗北の少年
subtitles.english: [Title: Defeated Boy]

subtitles.original: お前ら！まだまだいくぞー！
subtitles.english: Everyone! We're still going!

subtitles.original: ぶつかって
subtitles.english: Bumping into things,

subtitles.original: 逃げ込んで
subtitles.english: running away,

subtitles.original: 僕はいつしか ここに立ってた
subtitles.english: before I knew it, I was standing here.

subtitles.original: 誰もが憧れる
subtitles.english: I wanted to be a hero

subtitles.original: ヒーローになりたくて でもなれなくて
subtitles.english: that everyone admires, but I couldn't.

subtitles.original: これぐらいじゃ
subtitles.english: Even though I knew

subtitles.original: 届かないこと 分かっていたのに
subtitles.english: that this wouldn't be enough to reach...

subtitles.original: 敗北の少年 現実を謳え
subtitles.english: Defeated boy, sing of reality.

subtitles.original: あんな風に空は飛べやしないんだ
subtitles.english: We can't fly in the sky like that.

subtitles.original: こんな夜に 意味があるなら
subtitles.english: If there's meaning in a night like this,

subtitles.original: 僕らは地を這う
subtitles.english: we crawl along the ground.

subtitles.original: 耳鳴りが こだまして
subtitles.english: The ringing in my ears echoes,

subtitles.original: 僕に奇跡が 問いかけるんだ
subtitles.english: and a miracle asks me.

subtitles.original: 「君の夢 憧れたヒーローに
subtitles.english: "I'll make you the hero

subtitles.original: 今すぐ させてあげよう」
subtitles.english: you've always dreamed of being right now."

subtitles.original: 飴みたいに 差し伸べられたって
subtitles.english: Even if it's offered to me like candy,

subtitles.original: 嬉しくないんだ
subtitles.english: I'm not happy about it.

subtitles.original: 敗北の少年 存在を謳え
subtitles.english: Defeated boy, sing of your existence.

subtitles.original: 君みたいに眩しくはなれないけど
subtitles.english: I can't be as dazzling as you,

subtitles.original: こんな夜に 意味があるなら
subtitles.english: but if there's meaning in a night like this,

subtitles.original: 僕らは地を這う
subtitles.english: we crawl along the ground,

subtitles.original: まだ地を這う
subtitles.english: we still crawl along the ground.

subtitles.original: 鼓動を知って 息を吸い込んで
subtitles.english: Feeling my heartbeat, taking a deep breath,

subtitles.original: 「僕は遠慮するよ」
subtitles.english: "I'll pass on that."

subtitles.original: 敗北の...
subtitles.english: Defeated...

subtitles.original: 敗北の少年 平凡を謳え
subtitles.english: Defeated boy, sing of the ordinary.

subtitles.original: あいにくと 神は信じないタチで
subtitles.english: Unfortunately, I don't believe in God.

subtitles.original: すれ違いの 物語よ さよなら
subtitles.english: Goodbye to this story of passing each other by.

subtitles.original: 敗北の少年 現実を謳え
subtitles.english: Defeated boy, sing of reality.

subtitles.original: 僕らは泥を 這い蹲るもの
subtitles.english: We are the ones who grovel in the mud.

subtitles.original: こんな夜も 愛しいから
subtitles.english: Because even a night like this is precious,

subtitles.original: 僕らは地を這う
subtitles.english: we crawl along the ground,

subtitles.original: ただ地を這う
subtitles.english: we just crawl along the ground.

subtitles.original: あのね。
subtitles.english: Hey...

subtitles.original: Luna say maybe
subtitles.english: [Title: Luna say maybe]

subtitles.original: あのね。I say “私、大丈夫？”
subtitles.english: You know, I say "Am I okay?"

subtitles.original: Maybe, うまくやれるはず
subtitles.english: Maybe I can pull it off.

subtitles.original: ずっと走った息継ぎもしないまま
subtitles.english: I've been running without catching my breath.

subtitles.original: あっそう、終わりが来るなら別に寂しくなんかはない
subtitles.english: Oh right, if the end comes, I won't be lonely.

subtitles.original: 真実は心の奥の方自分のことすら愛せないまま
subtitles.english: Deep down, I still can't even love myself.

subtitles.original: 君のこと守れるのかな“信じて”
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can protect you... "Believe me."
